title: Redirect unauthenticated visitors to login and return after sign in
description: An unauthenticated visitor trying to access a protected page is redirected to login and can return to the intended protected page after authenticating.

steps.description: Navigate to /student/dashboard
Verify the login page is displayed
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the student dashboard is displayed

title: Student signs in and reaches the student dashboard
description: This verifies that a student can log in and land on the correct dashboard after authentication.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Verify the student dashboard is displayed

title: Teacher signs in and reaches the teacher dashboard
description: This verifies that a teacher can log in and land on the correct dashboard after authentication.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Verify the teacher dashboard is displayed

title: Upload a valid HTML and CSS project and open the result
description: A student can submit a valid project package and reach the evaluation result page with scores and feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the upload page
Upload a valid HTML and CSS project folder
Submit the project for evaluation
Verify the evaluation result page is displayed
Verify scores and feedback are displayed

title: Protected student pages redirect unauthenticated visitors to login
description: This verifies that an unauthenticated visitor cannot open protected student pages and is redirected to the login page.

steps.description: Navigate to /student/dashboard
Verify the login page is displayed

title: Block student access to teacher dashboard
description: A student who logs in can access student areas but is prevented from viewing the teacher dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the teacher dashboard
Verify the teacher dashboard is not displayed
Verify an access restriction view or redirect is displayed

title: Student can upload a valid project and view the evaluation result
description: This verifies that a student can submit a valid HTML/CSS project folder and reach the evaluation result with scores and feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Click the project upload navigation
Select a valid HTML/CSS project folder
Submit the upload
Verify the evaluation result is displayed
Verify score breakdown and feedback are displayed

title: New student account can be created and routed correctly
description: This verifies that a new student can register with role selection and reach the student dashboard after signup.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Choose the student role
Fill in the full name field with Test Student
Fill in the email field with a unique valid email address
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Submit the registration form
Verify the student dashboard is displayed

title: Review AI evaluation scores and feedback
description: A student can open the AI evaluation result page and see the overall score, section scores, feedback, and improvement recommendations for a submitted project.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the AI evaluation result page
Verify the overall score and section scores are displayed
Verify detailed feedback and improvement recommendations are displayed

Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the teacher dashboard
Verify classroom overview metrics are displayed
Verify student performance information is displayed

title: Reject an invalid project package before evaluation
description: A student can try to upload an invalid project package and receive validation feedback without generating a result.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the upload page
Upload an invalid project package
Submit the project for evaluation
Verify a validation error is displayed
Verify no evaluation result is generated

title: Student upload rejects an invalid project package
description: This verifies that a student receives validation feedback when uploading a project that does not contain the expected HTML/CSS content.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Click the project upload navigation
Select files that do not include the expected HTML/CSS content
Submit the upload
Verify upload validation feedback is displayed
Verify no evaluation result is displayed
